twitter_posts.title:
Live now → https://www.makecomics.io/

Launched 24 hours ago and already have 1k signups and over 900 comics made!
twitter_posts.description:
Live now → makecomics.io/

Launched 24 hours ago and already have 1k signups and over 900 comics made!



Hassan (@nutlope)

Built an app that can generate an entire comic in a few seconds.

You can upload your own characters, choose a theme, & build your own comic page by page!
twitter_posts.author: Hassan El Mghari

twitter_posts.title:
R to @AnthropicAI: A central lesson of this work is that autonomy is co-constructed by the model, user, and product. It can't be fully characterized by pre-deployment evaluations alone.

For full deta
twitter_posts.description:
A central lesson of this work is that autonomy is co-constructed by the model, user, and product. It can't be fully characterized by pre-deployment evaluations alone.

For full details, and our recommendations to developers and policymakers, see the blog: anthropic.com/research/m
twitter_posts.author: Anthropic

twitter_posts.title:
R to @AnthropicAI: Software engineering makes up ~50% of agentic tool calls on our API, but we see emerging use in other industries. 

As the frontier of risk and autonomy expands, post-deployment mon
twitter_posts.description:
Software engineering makes up ~50% of agentic tool calls on our API, but we see emerging use in other industries. 

As the frontier of risk and autonomy expands, post-deployment monitoring becomes essential. We encourage other model developers to extend this research.

articles.title: Samsung is adding Perplexity to Galaxy AI
articles.description: In addition to summoning Bixby or Gemini, Galaxy S26 users will be able to call on Perplexity by saying "hey, Plex." The integration of Perplexity into Galaxy AI is just one element of the company's embrace of a "multi-agent ecosystem." Often, people will use different AI agents for different tasks,

articles.title: Red/green TDD
articles.description:
Agentic Engineering Patterns >
    "Use red/green TDD" is a pleasingly succinct way to get better results out of a coding agent.
TDD stands for Test Driven Development. It's a programming style where you ensure every piece of code you write is accompanied by automated tests that demonstrate the

articles.title: The Claude C Compiler: What It Reveals About the Future of Software
articles.description:
The Claude C Compiler: What It Reveals About the Future of Software
On February 5th Anthropic's Nicholas Carlini wrote about a project to use parallel Claudes to build a C compiler on top of the brand new Opus 4.6
Chris Lattner (Swift, LLVM, Clang, Mojo) knows more about C compilers than most.

articles.title: Building Multi-Agent Applications with Deep Agents
articles.description: Breaking down complex tasks across specialized agents is one of the most effective approaches to building capable AI systems. In this post, we'll show you how to build multi-agent systems with Deep Agents.

articles.title: Anthropic-funded group backs candidate attacked by rival AI super PAC
articles.description: Dueling pro-AI PACs have centered around backing or targeting one New York congressional bid: Alex Bores, whose RAISE Act requires AI developers to disclose safety protocols and report serious system misuse.
